mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement-where your sense of superiority earns you VIP banking perks like never before!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-I stroll into my Bank of Entitlement branch, expecting the red carpet treatment. My personal banker, let's call her Janet, had the audacity to make me wait for a whole five minutes. Can you believe it? Me, Hot Josh, esteemed CEO, waiting like some commoner. I demanded to speak to her supervisor immediately, of course. When the branch manager arrived, I made it clear that I would not tolerate such disrespect. Janet was promptly reprimanded, and I received a handwritten apology letter along with a complimentary gold-plated fountain pen as a token of reconciliation. Needless to say, I left feeling vindicated and superior, as any valued client should.
